title: ochthocharis ovata
intro: Ochthocharis ovata, also known as the small-flowered ochthocharis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is primarily found in the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an expectorant. The herbal preparations of Ochthocharis ovata typically involve drying and powdering the plant, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or as a supplement to promote overall well-being.
